project.name: fraud-detector
project.summary: Anomaly / fraud detection — Week 2 slice: data + EDA + an honest baseline.

tasks.text: Acquire the ULB Credit Card Fraud dataset
Store as parquet + a reproducible ingest.py
EDA: class imbalance, feature distributions, time / velocity signal
Eval on PR-AUC + precision/recall @ threshold; write results to README
